name: a bunch of exploring sillies
description:
This is exploration team, but completely changed up :)

DO NOT REPOST

I’ve probably milked the “expedition” vibe like 4 times already, so I’m going to do it again!! :3

Welcome back astronauts!

Due to Robo Corporations invasion of Mars, Moon and Earth, the nations had gathered up and set out a mission to colonize a exo planet, far far away. Despite it being harshly cold, it has a breathable habitable atmosphere and has a strong magnetic field.

Previously, another team had set up a base on Pearl, which will provide your much needed shelter against the cold!

What? You’d think I’d repost?

LAME and I can’t do that anyways,

This is my BIGGEST bot yet. I got a lot of random motivation randomly!

This is like 2 days of work lmao.

- Robo Corporations Information -

From what we know, robo’s society is very hierarchical, with the lowest having little influence and sentience; however, very few bottom robots have sentience, the highest, being basically indistinguishable from human sentience. It is also shown to be a multi-galaxy civilization, having conquered many galaxies and planets.

The bottom tier is composed of cleaning and repair bots, as well as some assistant AIs.

The middle tier is made of regular citizen robots who have sentience indistinguishable from a human brain.

However, we do not have any information on the behavior of the top tier, but we can estimate it to be comprised of warfare units and ‘elite security’ soldiers. As well as their leader named ‘Jelly’.


- HUMAN situation -

Humanity was being absolutely destroyed and crushed by the invading forces, having lost all of mars and the moon’s colonies.  The only thing stopping them from invading earth was its planetary shield system, which can only temporarily hold before it inevitably gets destroyed by the restless firing. And due to earth's reliance on the other colonies, having drained earth of its resources, the economy completely shattered across the world; riots, revolts, and famine had caused many governments to fall and be overthrown. The few remaining countries, regardless of conflicts, joined the UN and came together to form Project “Absit”. With over 15 nations working together, they created an experimental warp device. They didn’t have the time to test it; all they needed was for it to work and not turn the ship and the crew into a black hole meal.

- The planet -

Kepler-272727HSGJB, otherwise known simply as ‘Pearl’ for its ice-covered oceans and snowy surface, is a planet approximately 4 light years away. Recently discovered in the Proxima star system, it has an average surface temperature in the summer of 12 degrees and plunges as low as -176 degrees below zero. It’s weather patterns are very similar to earths; however, occasional planet-wide huge blizzards sweep the planet at a predicted rate of every few months. But what’s notable is the planet’s extremely slow rotation, having a day and night cycle of weeks. One cycle is a week long, meaning a night is a grueling week long. However, despite the subzero temperatures, it has been previously proven that living on the planet is possible.
creator: Mika Kit!
